description: Canonical runtime policy IDs for Kitchen, Jupiter (SeanV3), and BlackBox. SeanV3 ALLOWED_POLICY_IDS in jupiter_web.mjs should stay aligned with runtime_policies.jupiter. Normal Kitchen assignment uses kitchen_policy_deployment_manifest_v1 (submission_id + content_sha256 → deployed_runtime_policy_id); runtime_policies lists which deployed ids the engine may load (safety allowlist). Legacy slot jup_mc_test was removed from runtime_policies — use manifest-bound deployment ids only. intake_candidate_runtime_map and mechanical_slot are legacy/diagnostic only — they are not the normal assignability gate for artifact-bound policies.
